summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Milk TS Sheet and RBAC features. All backend API tests (23/23) passed. All frontend UI tests passed. RBAC is working correctly for all 3 roles (admin, modify, view).
passed_tests: Auth: Admin login (admin/admin123)
Auth: Viewer login (viewer/viewer123)
Auth: Modify user login (supervisor/super123)
Milk Stock CRUD: GET /api/milk-stock returns list
Milk Stock CRUD: POST /api/milk-stock creates entry with correct fat_kg/snf_kg calculation
Milk Stock CRUD: PUT /api/milk-stock/{id} updates entry
Milk Stock CRUD: DELETE /api/milk-stock/{id} deletes entry (admin only)
Milk TS Report: GET /api/reports/milk-ts returns valid structure (opening, purchased, used, closing)
Milk TS Report: Date range filter works (start_date, end_date params)
Milk TS Report: Daily summary has all required fields
Milk TS Report: Closing calculation verified (opening + purchased - used)
RBAC View User: Can read milk stock
RBAC View User: Cannot create milk stock (403)
RBAC View User: Cannot update milk stock (403)
RBAC View User: Cannot delete milk stock (403)
RBAC View User: Cannot create batch (403)
RBAC Modify User: Can create milk stock
RBAC Modify User: Can update milk stock
RBAC Modify User: Cannot delete milk stock (403)
RBAC Modify User: Cannot delete batch (403)
RBAC Admin User: Can create milk stock
RBAC Admin User: Can update milk stock
RBAC Admin User: Can delete milk stock
UI: Milk TS Sheet page loads at /milk-total-solid
UI: Add Milk Purchase form has all fields (date, quantity_kg, fat_percent, snf_percent, notes)
UI: Calculated Values section shows fat_kg and snf_kg
UI: Edit Milk Purchase form opens correctly
UI: TS Report summary cards show Opening/Purchased/Used/Closing
UI: Daily Summary table shows date-wise breakdown
UI: Show Transaction Details toggle works
UI: Date range filter (Apply/Reset) works
UI: Export button visible
UI: Admin sees Add/Edit/Delete buttons on Milk TS Sheet
UI: Viewer does NOT see Add/Edit/Delete buttons on Milk TS Sheet
UI: Viewer does NOT see Add/Edit/Delete buttons on Batch Entry
UI: Modify user sees Add/Edit buttons but NOT Delete on Milk TS Sheet
UI: Modify user sees Create/Edit buttons but NOT Delete on Batch Entry
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Milk TS Sheet feature fully tested. RBAC working correctly for all 3 roles. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/milk-stock, GET /api/reports/milk-ts. Frontend route: /milk-total-solid. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_milk_ts_rbac.py. All 4 milk purchase entries visible in the system. Daily summary shows 2 dates (2026-03-22, 2026-03-23). TS calculations verified: Closing = Opening + Purchased - Used.
